title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Howdle Freeths Legal PO Scheme Ltd
body: "Application number 5084  Applicant Freeths LLP objected to the name used by Howdle Freeths Legal PO Scheme Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 9 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Howdle Freeths Legal PO Scheme Ltd is changed to 15743195, Ltd. "
